creator: anthropic.com

evidence.text: To capture the judgment that used to live only in people's heads, Accenture also built a "Skill Studio" where business users document tacit knowledge as reusable skills the agent calls on when it needs them.One of the skills includes how to interpret competitive data and formulate actions from it. The majority of these skills are optional, meaning the agent can choose to leverage them but is not required to. The agent can also modify skills over time as it optimizes its actions and learns based on its results.
